title: leucanthemum odoratum
intro: Leucanthemum odoratum, also known as the sweet-scented daisy, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum odoratum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
